response.justification: Maria brings over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience, including entrepreneurial success as a founder and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure. While she meets the baseline technical and tenure requirements, her profile aligns more closely with a hands-on Staff Engineer than a Director-level AI Strategist. Her lack of long-term, recognized AI/ML expertise and enterprise-level strategic advisory experience makes her a borderline fit for this specific Principal role.
strengths: Over 15 years of comprehensive software engineering experience across multiple domains and tech stacks.
Strong entrepreneurial background, having founded and maintained an open-source event-driven platform.
Recent, highly relevant hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and working with the Model Context Protocol.
concerns: Lacks a demonstrated long-term track record of recognized AI/ML expertise or advanced AI degrees.
Experience is primarily at the Senior/Staff execution level rather than the expected Director-level strategic capacity.
Limited evidence of advising enterprise customers or partners on high-level cloud and AI adoption strategies.
